creator: william88@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

The same stuff about new lib depends format and do-install/post-install.
Also you should define DOCS in the options.

Other than that, approved.

On Sat, Aug 17, 2013 at 9:00 AM, Rusmir Dusko <nemysis@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Capi City is a client for the online server monopd.
> You can play Monopoly like games with it online.
>
> Integrated Capid to be able to start a server for LAN.
>
> WWW: http://linux-ecke.de/CapiCity/
>
>
> Build log
>
> https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130817103801-46159/
